name: Macaroni & Cheese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cooked macaroni, shredded American cheese, sliced celery, and chopped onion in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the salad dressing, vinegar, and pepper until well combined.
3. Stir the seasoned dressing mixture into the macaroni combination.
4. Serve 2 servings, each containing approximately 1 cup, with about 270 calories per serving.
